'''Mezer''' was a [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] in the [[Corellian Security Force]] as of [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. He piloted [[Lumiya|Silfinia]] and [[Darth Caedus|Najack Ell]]'s transport to the designated retrieval zone for the supposed meeting of the [[Confederation]] at [[Gilatter VIII]], unaware that the 'Ells' were in fact [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] and [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lady]] [[Lumiya]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]'' {{1st}}
